key.name: opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage applied while the transparent top bar style is active. 0 is fully transparent and 100 is fully opaque.

key.name: keep-transparent-with-windows
key.description: When enabled, the top bar stays transparent even when a window touches or is maximized against the top bar.

key.name: content-shadow-strength
key.description: Strength of the text and icon shadow applied to top bar items. 0 disables it and 100 makes it strongest.

key.name: panel-shadow-strength
key.description: Strength of the box shadow applied to the panel background. 0 disables it and 100 makes it strongest.

key.name: content-color-scheme
key.description: Controls whether text and symbolic icons in the top bar use a light or dark color treatment. Full-color application icons are not changed.

key.name: force-white-in-overview
key.description: When enabled, top bar text and symbolic icons switch to white while the GNOME Shell overview is open.

key.name: font
key.description: Optional Pango font description used for the GNOME Shell top bar. When empty, the shell theme default font is used.
